items.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
items.dek: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
items.body: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rights groups critical as Venezuela prisoner release scheme 'coming to an end'
items.dek: More than 500 political prisoners are thought to still be in jail, despite the releases since the amnesty law was brought in.
items.body: More than 500 political prisoners are thought to still be in jail, despite the releases since the amnesty law was brought in.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hope in Gaza as 300 couples get married at one time
items.dek: The 300 couples were selected in a draw of nearly 2,000 people to be a part of the joint celebration.
items.body: The 300 couples were selected in a draw of nearly 2,000 people to be a part of the joint celebration.
items.author: IriLine Desk
